{"key_event":"Colonial consolidation and forced labor expansion","reasoning":"Belgian rule deepened through taxation, courts, chiefs, labor recruitment, mining transport, and WWI mobilization, pushing state capacity from moderate toward strong despite pandemic disruption. Civil society remained near-atomized: Kimbanguism and mission networks showed some mobilizing potential, but forced labor, compulsory crops, requisitions, and repression kept autonomous organization extremely weak.","society_change":-0.1,"society_power":1.1,"state_change":0.8,"state_power":6.8}
